name: PER_ABSENCE_CASES
description: This table is to store the Details of Absence Cases. Absence Case is a collection of Absences of an Employee grouped manually based on some criteria.

columns.Name: ABSENCE_CASE_ID
columns.Comments: System generated Primary Key. Uniquely identifies a record.

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: ST DATE

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: END DT

columns.Name: PERIOD_OF_SERVICE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE table.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: NAME
columns.Comments: Identifies the name for the absence case.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_PERSONS table. Identifies the person.

columns.Name: INCIDENT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_WORK_INCIDENTS table.

columns.Name: ABSENCE_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: A group of related absence types for reporting purposes.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: Denotes description for the Absence Case.

columns.Name: ABSENCE_CATEGORY_ID
columns.Comments: ABSENCE_CATEGORY_ID

columns.Name: ABSENCE_CASE_CODE
columns.Comments: Alternate key or user key that contains a user defined value that can be used to identify an absence case record
